title: Inlet Thermistor Open Circuit
shortDescription: The inlet temperature thermistor has an open circuit, preventing temperature monitoring.
fullDescription: Error code E4A indicates the inlet (supply air) temperature thermistor has failed with an open circuit condition. The control board cannot read the air temperature entering the drum, which is essential for proper heat regulation. The dryer will stop to prevent overheating.

causes.cause: Control board thermistor input circuit failure

symptoms: E4A error code on display
Dryer will not start or stops mid-cycle
No heat or uncontrolled heat
Error appears immediately or shortly after starting

fixSteps.title: Locate the inlet thermistor
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer. The inlet thermistor is typically located near the heating element housing or at the air intake duct. Consult your model's wiring diagram for exact location.

fixSteps.title: Check wiring connection
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect the thermistor wire connector for looseness or corrosion. Disconnect and reseat the connector firmly.

fixSteps.title: Test thermistor resistance
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect the thermistor leads. Measure resistance with a multimeter. At room temperature (72F/22C), it should read approximately 10K-12K ohms. An open reading (infinite/OL) confirms the thermistor is faulty.

fixSteps.title: Replace thermistor
fixSteps.instruction: Remove the mounting screw or clip holding the thermistor. Install the new thermistor in the same location and reconnect the wiring.

whenToCallPro: Only if replacing the thermistor does not resolve the error, suggesting a control board issue.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E4A error thermistor fix

faq.q: What is a thermistor?
faq.a: A thermistor is a temperature-sensitive resistor. Its resistance changes predictably with temperature, allowing the control board to monitor air temperature.

faq.q: Can I run the dryer without fixing E4A?
faq.a: No. Without temperature monitoring, the dryer could overheat and create a fire hazard. The error prevents operation for safety.

faq.q: Is the inlet thermistor the same as the high-limit thermostat?
faq.a: No. The thermistor provides continuous temperature readings to the electronic control board. The high-limit thermostat is a separate safety device that trips at a specific temperature.

title: Exhaust Thermistor Failure
shortDescription: The exhaust temperature thermistor has failed or is reading out of range.
fullDescription: Error code E5B indicates the exhaust (outlet air) temperature thermistor is not providing valid readings. This sensor monitors the temperature of air leaving the drum, which is critical for cycle completion and preventing overheating.

causes.cause: Lint buildup on thermistor causing false readings

symptoms: E5B error code on display
Dryer runs but does not dry clothes properly
Auto-dry cycles end too early or run too long
Dryer overheats or does not heat enough

fixSteps.title: Clean the exhaust path
fixSteps.instruction: Clean the lint trap thoroughly. Check and clean the exhaust vent hose and exterior vent. Lint buildup can affect thermistor readings.

fixSteps.title: Locate and inspect thermistor
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer. The exhaust thermistor is usually located in the exhaust duct area near where air exits the drum. Check for lint accumulation on the sensor.

fixSteps.title: Test thermistor resistance
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect the thermistor and measure resistance. At room temperature, expect 10K-12K ohms. If the reading is open (OL) or zero, the thermistor is faulty.

fixSteps.title: Replace thermistor
fixSteps.instruction: Remove the old thermistor and install the replacement. Ensure proper routing of wires away from heat sources.

whenToCallPro: If the thermistor tests good but the error persists, the control board sensor circuit may need professional diagnosis.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E5B error exhaust thermistor fix

faq.q: Can a clogged vent cause E5B?
faq.a: A severely clogged vent can cause abnormally high exhaust temperatures that may stress the thermistor, but typically E5B indicates an electrical failure rather than a temperature issue.

faq.q: How often should I clean the dryer vent?
faq.a: Clean the lint trap after every load and the full exhaust vent system at least once a year to prevent overheating and fire hazards.

faq.q: Is E5B related to the moisture sensor?
faq.a: No. The moisture sensor detects dampness in clothes, while the exhaust thermistor measures air temperature. They are separate systems.

title: Heater Element Open Circuit
shortDescription: The heating element circuit is open, meaning the heater cannot produce heat.
fullDescription: Error code E64 indicates the control board has detected an open circuit in the heating element. The element has either burned out, a thermal fuse has blown, or there is a wiring problem preventing current from flowing through the heater circuit.

causes.cause: Blown thermal fuse or high-limit thermostat
Defective heater relay on control board

symptoms: E64 error code on display
Dryer runs but produces no heat
Clothes remain wet after full cycle
Dryer may not start at all on some models

fixSteps.title: Check thermal fuse
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer. Locate the thermal fuse (usually on the exhaust duct or heater housing). Test continuity - it should show near zero ohms. If open, it has blown.

fixSteps.title: Test high-limit thermostat
fixSteps.instruction: Test the high-limit thermostat for continuity. If open, it has tripped and needs replacement. Also investigate why it tripped (usually restricted airflow).

fixSteps.title: Test heating element
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect the heating element leads. Measure resistance across the element terminals. Should read 8-20 ohms for electric dryers. An open reading means the element has burned out.

fixSteps.title: Replace faulty component
fixSteps.instruction: Replace the thermal fuse, thermostat, or heating element as needed. If the thermal fuse blew, also clean the exhaust vent system to address the root cause.

whenToCallPro: If all heater circuit components test good, the control board relay may be faulty and needs professional diagnosis.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E64 error no heat heating element fix

faq.q: Why did the thermal fuse blow?
faq.a: The thermal fuse blows to prevent fire when the dryer overheats. The most common cause is a clogged exhaust vent. Always clean the vent before replacing the fuse.

faq.q: Can I bypass the thermal fuse temporarily?
faq.a: Never bypass the thermal fuse. It is a critical fire safety device. If it blows repeatedly, fix the underlying airflow problem.

faq.q: How long does a heating element last?
faq.a: A typical dryer heating element lasts 8-18 years. Elements burn out faster if the dryer is frequently overloaded or the vent is restricted.

title: Heater Stuck On - Relay Shorted
shortDescription: The heater control relay is stuck in the ON position, causing continuous heating.
fullDescription: Error code E68 indicates the control board has detected that the heating element is energized when it should be off. The heater relay has likely welded shut or a TRIAC has shorted, causing uncontrolled heating. This is a critical safety error.

causes.cause: Welded heater relay contacts on control board

symptoms: E68 error code displayed
Dryer continues to heat even after cycle ends
Clothes may come out extremely hot or scorched
Burning smell from dryer

fixSteps.title: Unplug immediately
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer immediately. A stuck-on heater is a fire hazard. Do not use the dryer until repaired.

fixSteps.title: Test heater relay
fixSteps.instruction: With the dryer unplugged, check the heater relay on the control board. Measure continuity across the relay output contacts - they should be open when the dryer is off. If shorted, the relay has welded.

fixSteps.title: Check heater element
fixSteps.instruction: Test the heating element for a short to ground. Measure resistance between each heater terminal and the dryer frame. It should be open (infinite resistance).

fixSteps.title: Replace control board
fixSteps.instruction: Replace the main control board to restore proper heater relay function. Also replace the heating element if it tested shorted to ground.

whenToCallPro: E68 is a safety-critical error. Professional repair is strongly recommended to ensure proper heater control is restored.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E68 error heater stuck on fix

faq.q: Is E68 a fire hazard?
faq.a: Yes. A heater that cannot be turned off is a serious fire risk. Do not use the dryer and unplug it immediately until repaired.

faq.q: Why does a relay weld shut?
faq.a: Electrical arcing across the relay contacts during switching can cause the contacts to fuse together over time, especially with high-current heater loads.

faq.q: Can I smell scorching with E68?
faq.a: If the heater ran uncontrolled before the error was detected, you may smell scorched lint or fabric. Inspect the drum and lint trap for damage.

title: Communication Error Between Boards
shortDescription: Communication between the main control board and user interface board has failed.
fullDescription: Error code E6A indicates a communication failure between the main electronic control board and the user interface (UI) board on the dryer. The serial data link between these boards has been interrupted.
symptoms: E6A displayed briefly on screen
Display goes blank or shows garbled information
Buttons do not respond
Dryer does not start when buttons are pressed

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer for 10 minutes. Communication glitches may clear with a full power cycle.

fixSteps.title: Reseat ribbon cable
fixSteps.instruction: Access the control panel area. Locate the ribbon cable connecting the two boards. Disconnect and firmly reseat both ends.

fixSteps.title: Inspect cable condition
fixSteps.instruction: Check the ribbon cable for tears, kinks, or pinched areas. Replace if damaged.

fixSteps.title: Replace faulty board
fixSteps.instruction: If the cable is intact, replace the UI board first (more commonly failed). If the error persists, replace the main control board.

whenToCallPro: If reseating the cable does not fix the issue and you cannot determine which board is faulty.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E6A error communication fix

faq.q: How do I know which board is bad?
faq.a: If the display still lights up, the UI board is likely working. If the display is dead, the UI board is the more likely culprit.

faq.q: Can vibration cause E6A?
faq.a: Yes. The ribbon cable connector can loosen over time from dryer vibration, especially if the dryer is not level.

faq.q: Is the cable sold separately?
faq.a: On some models, the ribbon cable is sold separately. On others, it comes attached to one of the boards.

title: Air Flow Restriction Detected
shortDescription: The dryer has detected restricted airflow through the exhaust system.
fullDescription: Error code EAF indicates the dryer's airflow monitoring system has detected restricted exhaust airflow. The temperature differential between inlet and exhaust indicates poor air movement through the drum and vent system. This is typically caused by a clogged lint trap, blocked vent hose, or obstructed exterior vent.

causes.cause: Blocked or kinked exhaust vent hose
Excessively long or routed vent ductwork

symptoms: EAF error on display during or after cycle
Clothes take much longer than normal to dry
Dryer exterior is very hot to touch
Excessive lint around dryer or vent connection
Humid or steamy laundry room

fixSteps.title: Clean lint trap
fixSteps.instruction: Remove and clean the lint screen. If using dryer sheets, wash the screen with soap and water occasionally to remove residue buildup that blocks airflow.

fixSteps.title: Inspect exhaust vent hose
fixSteps.instruction: Pull the dryer away from the wall. Disconnect the vent hose and check for lint buildup, kinks, or crushes. Use a vent cleaning brush to clear lint from the hose.

fixSteps.title: Check exterior vent cap
fixSteps.instruction: Go outside and check the vent exhaust cap. Remove any lint, debris, or animal nests. The flap should open freely when air is blown through.

fixSteps.title: Evaluate vent system
fixSteps.instruction: If the total vent run exceeds 25 feet or has more than 2 elbows, airflow will be restricted. Consider shortening the run or using smooth rigid metal ductwork instead of flexible ribbed hose.

whenToCallPro: If the vent system is long, complex, or routed through walls/ceilings, consider a professional vent cleaning service.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer EAF error restricted airflow vent cleaning

faq.q: Is restricted airflow a fire hazard?
faq.a: Yes. Lint buildup combined with restricted airflow is the leading cause of dryer fires. The EAF warning should be taken seriously and addressed immediately.

faq.q: How often should I clean the dryer vent?
faq.a: Clean the lint trap after every load. The full exhaust vent should be professionally cleaned at least once a year, or more often with heavy use.

faq.q: Can I use vinyl flexible duct?
faq.a: No. Vinyl and thin foil ducts are fire hazards. Use rigid or semi-rigid metal ductwork for dryer exhaust.

title: Exhaust Overheating - High Limit
shortDescription: The exhaust temperature has exceeded the high-limit threshold due to restricted airflow.
fullDescription: Error code EF1 indicates the exhaust temperature has exceeded the safe operating limit. This is typically one step beyond EAF - the airflow restriction has caused actual overheating. The dryer shuts down to prevent fire risk. The high-limit thermostat or thermal fuse may have tripped.
symptoms: EF1 error on display
Dryer shuts off mid-cycle
Very hot air coming from dryer or vent area
Burning smell from dryer
Clothes scorched or extremely hot

fixSteps.title: Unplug and cool down
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer and allow it to cool completely before working on it. Do not restart until the cause is found and fixed.

fixSteps.title: Thoroughly clean entire vent system
fixSteps.instruction: Clean the lint trap, the vent hose, the in-wall ductwork, and the exterior vent cap. Use a dryer vent cleaning brush kit to clear the full length.

fixSteps.title: Test high-limit thermostat and thermal fuse
fixSteps.instruction: Test both the high-limit thermostat and thermal fuse for continuity. If either has tripped (open circuit), it must be replaced. However, only replace AFTER fixing the root cause.

fixSteps.title: Inspect blower wheel
fixSteps.instruction: Remove the dryer top or front panel to access the blower wheel. Check that it spins freely, is not cracked, and is firmly attached to the motor shaft. A slipping blower severely reduces airflow.

whenToCallPro: If the vent system is complex or the blower wheel needs replacement. Also call a pro if the cause cannot be identified.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer EF1 error overheating fix

faq.q: My thermal fuse keeps blowing. Why?
faq.a: The thermal fuse is a symptom, not the cause. A restricted vent causes overheating which blows the fuse. Fix the vent restriction first, then replace the fuse.

faq.q: Is EF1 more serious than EAF?
faq.a: Yes. EAF is a warning about restricted airflow. EF1 means the restriction has caused actual overheating, which is a fire safety issue.

faq.q: Can I replace just the thermal fuse?
faq.a: You can, but if you do not fix the vent restriction, the new fuse will blow again. Always address the root cause.

title: Power Supply Voltage Error
shortDescription: The dryer has detected incorrect incoming power supply voltage.
fullDescription: Error code EF2 indicates the dryer's control board has detected that the incoming power supply voltage is outside the acceptable range. For electric dryers, this means one or both legs of the 240V supply may be missing or too low. For gas dryers, the 120V supply may be incorrect.

causes.cause: Loose wire connection in electrical panel

symptoms: EF2 error code on display
Dryer runs but has no heat (electric dryer)
Dryer will not start at all
Display may be dim or flicker

fixSteps.title: Check circuit breaker
fixSteps.instruction: Check the electrical panel for the dryer breaker. For 240V electric dryers, this is a double-pole breaker. Both halves must be ON. Reset the breaker by flipping it fully OFF then ON.

fixSteps.title: Test outlet voltage
fixSteps.instruction: Use a multimeter to measure voltage at the dryer outlet. Electric dryers should read 240V between the two hot terminals, and 120V from each hot to neutral. Gas dryers should read 120V.

fixSteps.title: Inspect power cord
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer and inspect the power cord for damage, burns, or loose prongs. Check the terminal block inside the dryer where the cord connects for tight connections.

fixSteps.title: Have electrician check wiring
fixSteps.instruction: If the outlet voltage is incorrect, have a licensed electrician check the wiring from the panel to the outlet, including all connections.

whenToCallPro: If the circuit breaker is fine but the outlet voltage is wrong, an electrician is needed to repair the wiring.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer EF2 error power voltage fix

faq.q: Can half the breaker trip?
faq.a: Yes. A double-pole breaker can trip one side while the other stays on. This provides 120V instead of 240V, which allows the motor to run but the heater will not work.

faq.q: Why does my dryer run but not heat?
faq.a: An electric dryer needs the full 240V for the heater. If only one leg of the 240V supply is present (120V), the motor and controls work but the heating element does not.

faq.q: Is EF2 on a gas dryer different?
faq.a: Gas dryers use 120V, so EF2 on a gas dryer indicates the 120V supply is too low or unstable. Check the outlet and circuit.

title: Communication Error - UI Board
shortDescription: The user interface board is not communicating properly with the main control board.
fullDescription: Error code E92 indicates a specific communication protocol error between the user interface board and the main control board. Data packets are being received but contain errors or unexpected values.

causes.cause: Corroded or loose ribbon cable connector

symptoms: E92 error on display
Dryer functions erratically
Button presses not recognized properly
Display shows incorrect cycle information

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer for 10 minutes to clear any communication protocol errors.

fixSteps.title: Reseat communication cable
fixSteps.instruction: Open the control console. Locate and reseat the ribbon cable connecting the UI board to the main board.

fixSteps.title: Clean connectors
fixSteps.instruction: Use electrical contact cleaner to clean the ribbon cable connector pins. Corrosion causes intermittent communication failures.

fixSteps.title: Replace UI board
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, replace the user interface board.

whenToCallPro: If replacing the UI board does not resolve the error.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E92 error communication UI board fix

faq.q: Is E92 the same as E6A?
faq.a: They are related but different. E6A is a complete communication loss, while E92 indicates corrupted data in the communication.

faq.q: Can a power surge cause E92?
faq.a: Yes, a power surge can damage the communication circuits on either board, leading to protocol errors.

faq.q: Do I need to reprogram the new UI board?
faq.a: Most replacement UI boards come pre-programmed. However, some may require a model-specific configuration which a service technician can set.

title: Configuration Data Error
shortDescription: The control board configuration data is invalid or corrupted.
fullDescription: Error code E93 indicates the main control board's configuration data (stored in non-volatile memory) has become corrupted. This data includes model-specific settings for cycle parameters, temperature limits, and timing. Without valid configuration data, the dryer cannot operate properly.

causes.cause: Corrupted EEPROM data on control board

symptoms: E93 error on display at startup
Dryer will not start any cycle
Error appears immediately when powered on
All buttons and display otherwise functional

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer for 15 minutes. Reconnect and check if the error clears. EEPROM corruption can sometimes be resolved by a full power cycle.

fixSteps.title: Verify correct board
fixSteps.instruction: If the control board was recently replaced, verify the part number matches your specific model. An incorrect board may have incompatible configuration data.

fixSteps.title: Attempt diagnostic reset
fixSteps.instruction: Enter the diagnostic mode by pressing the appropriate key combination for your model. Some models allow a factory reset from diagnostic mode.

fixSteps.title: Replace main control board
fixSteps.instruction: If the EEPROM data cannot be restored, replace the main control board with the correct part number for your model.

whenToCallPro: If a power reset does not clear E93, the control board likely needs replacement.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E93 error configuration data fix

faq.q: What is EEPROM?
faq.a: EEPROM is a type of non-volatile memory chip on the control board that stores configuration data. It retains data even when power is off.

faq.q: Can a technician reprogram the EEPROM?
faq.a: Some service technicians have access to programming tools that can write correct configuration data to the EEPROM, avoiding the need for a full board replacement.

faq.q: Does this mean my board is dead?
faq.a: Not necessarily. The board hardware may be fine, but the stored data is corrupt. However, for most homeowners, board replacement is the practical solution.

title: Cycle Configuration Error
shortDescription: The selected cycle parameters do not match the stored configuration.
fullDescription: Error code E94 indicates a mismatch between the cycle selected on the UI board and the cycle parameters stored on the main control board. This can occur when boards are mismatched or configuration data is partially corrupted.

causes.cause: Mismatched UI and main control boards
Failed UI board sending incorrect cycle selection

symptoms: E94 error when selecting certain cycles
Some cycles work while others trigger the error
Error appears after board replacement
Random cycle selection errors

fixSteps.title: Verify board compatibility
fixSteps.instruction: Check part numbers on both the UI board and main control board against your model's specification. They must be compatible.

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer for 15 minutes to reset both boards.

fixSteps.title: Run diagnostic mode
fixSteps.instruction: Enter diagnostic mode to test all cycles. This may help identify which specific cycle triggers the error.

fixSteps.title: Replace mismatched board
fixSteps.instruction: If boards are mismatched, obtain the correct part number for your model and replace the incorrect board.

whenToCallPro: If both boards are correct for the model but E94 persists, professional firmware diagnosis is needed.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E94 error cycle configuration fix

faq.q: Why would boards be mismatched?
faq.a: This commonly happens when a previous repair used an incorrect replacement board, or when universal replacement boards are installed without proper configuration.

faq.q: Can I use a different model's board?
faq.a: No. Even boards that look identical may have different firmware and configuration data. Always use the exact part number specified for your model.

faq.q: Does the error appear on all cycles?
faq.a: Not necessarily. Only cycles that have mismatched parameters between the boards will trigger E94. Other cycles may work normally.

title: Main Control Board Memory Error
shortDescription: The main control board has detected an internal memory error.
fullDescription: Error code E95 indicates the main control board has detected a failure in its onboard memory (RAM or EEPROM). The board cannot reliably store or retrieve data needed for cycle operation. This is typically a permanent hardware failure.

causes.cause: Failed memory chip on control board

symptoms: E95 error at startup
Dryer completely non-functional
Error persists through power resets
No cycles can be started

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer for 15 minutes. On rare occasions, a memory error can be a transient fault that clears with a reset.

fixSteps.title: Check for power surge evidence
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect the control board for burn marks, swollen capacitors, or other visible damage that might indicate surge damage.

fixSteps.title: Test board connections
fixSteps.instruction: Reseat all wire harness connectors on the control board. A poor connection can sometimes mimic a memory error.

fixSteps.title: Replace main control board
fixSteps.instruction: Replace the main control board. This is the definitive fix for a memory hardware failure.

whenToCallPro: A memory error almost always requires board replacement. Professional installation ensures correct configuration.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E95 error control board memory fix

faq.q: Will unplugging fix E95?
faq.a: In rare cases, a transient memory error can clear with a power reset. However, if the error returns, the board must be replaced.

faq.q: Can the memory chip be repaired?
faq.a: Memory chips can potentially be replaced by a skilled electronics technician, but for most people, full board replacement is the practical solution.

faq.q: Should I use a surge protector?
faq.a: Yes, a surge protector can help prevent future memory chip damage from power surges, though dryers generally should be on a dedicated circuit.

title: UI Board Software Incompatibility
shortDescription: The user interface board software version is incompatible with the main control board.
fullDescription: Error code E96 indicates the software versions on the UI board and main control board are not compatible. The boards have established communication but the software protocols or data formats do not match, preventing normal operation.

causes.cause: Replacement board with different software version
Board from different production run or region

symptoms: E96 error immediately after installing new board
Dryer non-functional
Display may show error during self-test
Previously working dryer fails after repair

fixSteps.title: Verify part numbers
fixSteps.instruction: Check the exact part numbers on both boards. Ensure the replacement matches the original or is an approved replacement.

fixSteps.title: Check for superseded parts
fixSteps.instruction: Contact Frigidaire parts support or check online to see if the part number has been superseded. The new number may include updated firmware.

fixSteps.title: Power cycle disconnected
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer, disconnect both boards from each other for 5 minutes, then reconnect and power up. This may trigger a re-sync.

fixSteps.title: Obtain compatible board
fixSteps.instruction: If the boards are confirmed incompatible, obtain the correct version. You may need to replace both boards as a matched pair.

whenToCallPro: If you cannot determine the correct compatible part numbers, a service technician can look up the exact requirements.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E96 error software incompatible board fix

faq.q: Can firmware be updated?
faq.a: On some models, a service technician with the appropriate tool can update firmware. This is not available to consumers.

faq.q: Why do software versions matter?
faq.a: The two boards must speak the same communication protocol. If one board was updated with new features or bug fixes, the other board must understand the new data format.

faq.q: Should I buy OEM boards?
faq.a: Always use OEM (Frigidaire/Electrolux) replacement boards. Aftermarket boards may not have compatible software and could trigger E96.

title: Dryer Configuration Not Set
shortDescription: The dryer's model-specific configuration has not been set after board replacement.
fullDescription: Error code E97 indicates the main control board requires model-specific configuration data that has not been programmed. This usually occurs after installing a new universal or blank control board that requires a technician to program the correct model configuration.

causes.cause: New control board not configured for model
Configuration data was cleared during repair
Wrong universal board without proper setup

symptoms: E97 error after new board installation
Dryer does not start any cycle
Error appears on first power-up with new board
Display otherwise functional

fixSteps.title: Check board type
fixSteps.instruction: Determine if the replacement board is model-specific (pre-configured) or a universal board requiring configuration. Model-specific boards should not show E97.

fixSteps.title: Enter configuration mode
fixSteps.instruction: Some boards can be configured through a specific button sequence. Check the tech sheet (usually inside the dryer cabinet) for configuration instructions.

fixSteps.title: Set DIP switches or jumpers
fixSteps.instruction: Some boards use DIP switches or jumpers to set the model configuration. Transfer the switch settings from the old board to the new one.

fixSteps.title: Have technician configure
fixSteps.instruction: If the board requires electronic programming, a service technician with the appropriate diagnostic tool must configure the board.

whenToCallPro: If the board requires electronic programming, a service technician is needed.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E97 error configuration not set fix

faq.q: Can I configure the board myself?
faq.a: If the board uses DIP switches or jumpers, yes. If it requires electronic programming through a service tool, a technician is needed.

faq.q: Should I buy a model-specific board?
faq.a: Yes. Model-specific boards come pre-configured and typically do not trigger E97. Universal boards are cheaper but require configuration.

faq.q: Where is the tech sheet?
faq.a: The technical data sheet is usually taped inside the dryer cabinet, on the back panel, or inside the bottom access panel area.

title: UI Board Configuration Error
shortDescription: The user interface board configuration is invalid or not set.
fullDescription: Error code E98 indicates the user interface board has invalid or missing configuration data. Similar to E97 for the main board, this error means the UI board needs to be programmed with model-specific settings to function correctly.

causes.cause: Power surge damage to UI board

symptoms: E98 error after UI board replacement
Display works but cycle selection fails
Incorrect cycles shown on display
Buttons mapped to wrong functions

fixSteps.title: Verify part number
fixSteps.instruction: Confirm the UI board part number matches your dryer model exactly. A wrong board will have incorrect cycle and option configurations.

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug the dryer for 15 minutes. Some UI boards may re-sync their configuration after a full power cycle.

fixSteps.title: Transfer overlay and settings
fixSteps.instruction: If the old UI board had a removable face panel or overlay, ensure it matches the new board. Some boards use the overlay to identify the model configuration.

fixSteps.title: Have technician configure
fixSteps.instruction: If the board requires electronic configuration, contact a service technician with access to the programming tool.

whenToCallPro: If the correct UI board still shows E98, professional configuration is needed.
videoSearchQuery: Frigidaire dryer E98 error UI board configuration fix

faq.q: Can I return a wrong UI board?
faq.a: Most parts suppliers accept returns of incorrect parts. Always verify the part number before installation.

faq.q: Are all Frigidaire UI boards the same?
faq.a: No. UI boards are model-specific and contain cycle menus, temperature settings, and option configurations unique to each model.

faq.q: Why does the display show wrong cycles?
faq.a: The UI board for a different model may have different cycle names and options programmed in. The overlay buttons will not match the board's software.
